HEXAGHOST-HEXAGHOST.aromaPrinciple: [sine][purple]I am bound. I endure. I am bound. I endure. [jitter]I am bound.[/jitter][/purple][/sine]
HEXAGHOST-HEXAGHOST.cardsModifierDescrip: Hexaghost cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
HEXAGHOST-HEXAGHOST.description:
An accursed spirit of the Spire.
Sealed to an eternal fate as a protector.
HEXAGHOST-HEXAGHOST.eventDeathPrevention: I cannot pass on yet... my flames still burn.
HEXAGHOST-HEXAGHOST.goldMonologue: [sine]Gold... it means nothing to the dead... and yet...[/sine]
HEXAGHOST-HEXAGHOST.title: The Hexaghost
